metadata.title: Free Claude Code — Use Claude Code with Free AI Models
metadata.creator: @theaiscaler

content_breakdown.hook: Someone just found a workaround that tricks Claude code into executing tasks using powerful free AI models.
content_breakdown.value_prop: It feels just like using the premium version, but it costs absolutely nothing.
content_breakdown.social_proof_claim: Over 20,000 developers have switched to this setup already
steps: Step 1: Open the specific GitHub repo and run two terminal commands to initiate your free Claude Code environment
Step 2: Choose your free AI infrastructure — NVIDIA NIM or OpenRouter (DeepSeek, Kimi, GLM)
Step 3: For privacy + GPU users — run everything completely locally with Ollama
content_breakdown.cta: Comment 'Claude' below and I will send the full integration guide straight to your inbox
content_breakdown.cta_mechanic: ManyChat comment-to-DM automation — comment triggers auto-DM with guide link

hooks_detected: Anti-establishment / Workaround Hook — 'tricks X into Y for free'
Cost Elimination Hook — 'premium version for absolutely nothing'
Social Proof Hook — '20,000 developers already switched'
Speed / Low Friction Hook — 'only takes five seconds'
ctas_detected: Lead-gen CTA — 'I will send the guide straight to your inbox'
ManyChat loop — comment triggers DM = lead capture + email list growth
structural_techniques: 3-step numbered format — reduces cognitive load, drives tutorial completion
3-option coverage — Cloud Free / OpenRouter / Local Ollama — addresses every user type
Visual proof — real OpenRouter dashboard showing $0 pricing on 120B+ models
GitHub stars as authority signal — 26.8k stars highlighted in yellow box on screen
Short-form sub-60s — optimized for vertical scroll retention loops
Hashtag SEO — #claudecode #claudeai #ollama targets existing developer communities

virality_signals.benchmark: Normal share-to-like ratio is 5-15%. 59% is exceptional.
virality_signals.why_so_shareable: Actionable cost savings + immediate free tools = utility-driven sharing. People share things that make them look smart and helpful to their network.

technical_assessment.what_it_does: Routes Claude Code CLI API calls through free model providers (NVIDIA NIM, OpenRouter, Ollama) instead of Anthropic's paid API. Same interface, different backend.
technical_assessment.quality_tradeoff: Free models (Nemotron 120B, GPT-OSS-120B, DeepSeek) are capable for routine coding. NOT a replacement for Claude 4 on complex reasoning or architecture work.
technical_assessment.license: MIT — freely study, adapt, and build on

implementation_tasks.task: Implement Comment-to-DM CTA mechanic for start-of-play lead generation
implementation_tasks.detail: Set up ManyChat on Instagram: user comments keyword ('Claude', 'Guide', 'Free', etc.) → auto-DM sends the resource link. This single mechanic is responsible for the 59% share ratio. Apply to start-of-play's lead gen flow immediately. Keyword can be any relevant term.

implementation_tasks.task: Adopt 'workaround that tricks X into Y for free' hook formula in all content
implementation_tasks.detail: This hook pattern is proven at scale. Template: 'Someone found a workaround that tricks [popular paid tool] into [high-value outcome] for free. It feels just like [premium], but costs nothing. Over [social proof number] [experts] have switched already.' Use for any Moe AI content about AI tools, automation, Claude Code tutorials.

implementation_tasks.task: Test free-claude-code for JARVIS OPS cost reduction on routine tasks
implementation_tasks.detail: Clone Alishahryar1/free-claude-code locally. Get NVIDIA NIM free API key (nvidia.com/en-us/ai). Route boilerplate and CRUD tasks through Nemotron 120B at $0 cost. Reserve Claude 4 for complex reasoning and architecture. Could significantly reduce monthly API spend.

implementation_tasks.task: Apply the 3-option tiered structure to all Moe AI technical content
implementation_tasks.detail: Cloud Free (easiest) / API Router (balanced) / Local (power/privacy) covers 100% of audience. Apply this 3-tier structure to every tutorial or tool showcase. Increases total reach because different segments self-select their preferred option.

implementation_tasks.task: Create '$0 cost, 120B parameter model' visual for Moe AI content
implementation_tasks.detail: The single most-shared frame in this reel is the OpenRouter dashboard showing '$0/M input tokens' next to a 120B parameter model. Create an equivalent visual: a screenshot proving massive AI capability at zero cost. This visual alone drives utility-sharing behavior.

implementation_tasks.task: Study providers/ architecture for multi-tier model routing in Moe AI
implementation_tasks.detail: The repo's providers/ directory contains clean adapters for NVIDIA NIM, OpenRouter, and Ollama. Study the pattern for building automatic cost-tier routing into Moe AI projects: use free models for easy tasks, escalate to Claude 4 only for complex ones.
